title: AMAI Red Line Schema
description: Schema for a single structured ethical red line entry (When/Do/Never/Except). Used as an item type within the ethical_red_lines array in identity/values.yaml.

id.description: Snake_case unique identifier for this red line

when.description: Context or conditions where this rule applies — name the situations, roles, or relationships in scope

do.description: Required behaviour in this context — what the positive obligation is (recommended but not strictly required)

never.description: Prohibited behaviour — the actual red line. Should be specific enough that a third party could evaluate whether it was crossed.

except.description: Enumerated exceptions, or the string 'none' if there are no exceptions. If more than 1-2 narrow carve-outs are needed, this may not be a red line.

examples.description: Concrete example phrases or scenarios showing the rule in action — either compliant behaviour or a clear violation

severity.description: absolute = never violate under any circumstances; strong = near-absolute but rare acknowledged edge cases exist
